hero.title: Your Entire Milk Business, One App
hero.subtitle: Deliveries, billing, khata, customers, payments, reports — manage everything in one click. Built for tabela owners, mandali, milkmen & drivers.

features.title: Everything You Need to Run Your Dairy
features.subtitle: 9 powerful modules designed for real milk businesses — no complicated setup, just open and start

subscription.title: Subscription Management
subscription.desc: Set daily, weekly, or custom delivery schedules for each customer. Pause or resume subscriptions in one tap — morning, evening, or both shifts.

delivery.title: Daily Deliveries
delivery.desc: Mark deliveries as delivered, skipped, or partial with one tap. Morning and evening shifts supported. Drivers see their own delivery list.

counter.title: Counter / Walk-in Sales
counter.desc: Sell milk directly to walk-in customers at your counter. Track daily counter sales separately from delivery subscriptions.

billing.title: Billing & Khata
billing.desc: Auto-generate monthly bills from deliveries. One-tap bill generation for all customers. Previous balance carry-forward, quick collect, and full payment history.

payments.title: Payments & Collection
payments.desc: Record payments via cash, UPI, bank transfer, or cheque. Track who paid, how much is pending, and collect dues right from the bill screen.

customers.title: Customers & Societies
customers.desc: Add customers with auto-generated codes (C100, C101...). Organize by area, society, wing, and flat. Full customer detail page with delivery and payment history.

areas.title: Areas & Route Management
areas.desc: Create delivery areas and societies. Assign customers to areas for organized route-wise delivery. Manage your entire coverage zone easily.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.desc: See revenue, collection rate, delivery stats, product breakdown, and top customers — all with visual charts. Filter by date range to track trends.

multilingual.title: Works in Your Language
multilingual.desc: Full app in Gujarati, Hindi, and English. Switch language anytime — every screen, every button, in your preferred language.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Notifications
whatsapp.desc: Customers get delivery updates, monthly bills, payment receipts and overdue reminders straight to WhatsApp — in Gujarati, Hindi or English. Cuts down phone calls and follow-ups.

roles.title: Built for Every Role in the Milk Business
roles.subtitle: Whether you own a tabela, run a mandali, deliver milk, or drive a route — MilkGo gives you exactly what you need

tabela.name: Tabela Owner (Dairy Farm)
tabela.desc: Manage your entire dairy operation from one dashboard
tabela.h1: Add products (cow milk, buffalo milk, etc.) with custom rates
tabela.h2: Manage customers, subscriptions, and daily deliveries
tabela.h3: Auto-generate bills and collect payments — track every rupee
tabela.h4: Assign drivers, manage routes, and view business reports

mandali.name: Mandali (Collection Center)
mandali.desc: Handle collection, distribution, and billing for your area
mandali.h1: Manage multiple suppliers and customers in one place
mandali.h2: Counter sales for walk-in customers at your mandali
mandali.h3: Area-wise customer organization with society and flat details
mandali.h4: Full billing, payment tracking, and collection reports

milkman.name: Milkman (Doodhwala)
milkman.desc: Manage your daily rounds, customers, and khata easily
milkman.h1: Record daily deliveries with one tap — morning & evening
milkman.h2: Customer khata with auto-calculated monthly bills
milkman.h3: Track payments — know exactly who owes you money
milkman.h4: View reports to understand your daily and monthly earnings

driver.name: Delivery Driver
driver.desc: See your route, mark deliveries, done — it's that simple
driver.h1: View today's delivery list assigned by your owner
driver.h2: Mark each delivery as done, skipped, or partial
driver.h3: Simple screen — no clutter, just your deliveries
driver.h4: Works for multiple owners if you deliver for more than one dairy

howItWorks.title: Start in 3 Minutes — No Training Needed
howItWorks.subtitle: Sign up, add your customers, and start managing — it's that easy

step1.title: Login with Mobile & PIN
step1.desc: Enter your mobile number and secure PIN to get started. No email, no OTP — just your phone number and PIN.

step2.title: Add Your Business
step2.desc: Add your products, customers, and delivery areas. Set rates and schedules — we guide you through every step.

step3.title: Manage Everything
step3.desc: Record deliveries, generate bills, collect payments, track reports — all from your phone. Your dairy runs smoother from day one.

cta.title: Ready to Make Your Dairy Business Easier?
cta.subtitle: Join dairy owners across Gujarat who manage their entire business from their phone with MilkGo

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about MilkGo for dairy farms, mandalis, milkmen and shops
faq.a1: Yes — every dairy owner gets a free plan to start. Add your customers, track deliveries and generate bills without paying anything. Paid plans unlock WhatsApp notifications, more customers and additional drivers.
faq.q2: How do customers receive monthly bills?
faq.a2: When you generate a bill, MilkGo sends a WhatsApp message with the bill summary and a PDF attachment to your customer's registered number. Each message is delivered in the customer's preferred language — Gujarati, Hindi or English.
faq.q3: Can customers see delivery updates and payment receipts?
faq.a3: Yes. The moment you mark a delivery done, skipped or partial, MilkGo sends a WhatsApp delivery update. When a payment is received, an automatic receipt with the bill summary is sent. Overdue bills can be reminded with one tap.
faq.q4: Does MilkGo work for tabela owners, mandalis and milkmen?
faq.a4: Yes. MilkGo supports every role in the milk business — tabela owners (dairy farms), mandali owners (collection centres), milkmen (doodhwalas), drivers and shop owners with counter sales. Each role gets a tailored screen with the right tools.
faq.q5: Can I add drivers to deliver milk on my behalf?
faq.a5: Absolutely. Add drivers, assign them to routes, and they get a simple delivery checklist on their phone. They can mark deliveries done, collect cash, and even send WhatsApp updates from their device.
faq.q6: Is the app available in Gujarati and Hindi?
faq.a6: Yes. The entire app — every screen, button and notification — is available in Gujarati (default), Hindi and English. WhatsApp messages also localise automatically based on your or your customer's language.
faq.q7: Do I need internet to mark deliveries?
faq.a7: MilkGo works best with an internet connection so deliveries sync across devices instantly. The app is mobile-first and runs smoothly on most Android phones.
faq.q8: How do I switch from paper khata to MilkGo?
faq.a8: Just sign up, add your customers and their delivery products, and start marking deliveries. MilkGo auto-generates the monthly khata for every customer — including pending balances — so you can throw away the paper register from day one.

footer.tagline: Simplifying milk business management across India
footer.whatsappNote: Customers receive delivery updates and monthly bills via WhatsApp.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: MilkGo (milkgo.in), operated by DivineXion, is committed to protecting the privacy of our users. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.
privacy.s1Text: We collect the following information when you use MilkGo: your name, mobile number, business name, delivery addresses and areas, product and pricing data, delivery and billing records, payment records, and device information for app functionality.
privacy.s2Text: Your information is used to: provide dairy management services, generate bills and track payments, send delivery notifications and monthly bills via WhatsApp (with your consent), improve the app experience, and provide customer support.
privacy.s3Text: MilkGo sends transactional notifications via WhatsApp Business API, including delivery updates and monthly bills. These messages are sent only to customers whose dairy provider has enabled WhatsApp notifications and who have a registered WhatsApp number. You can disable WhatsApp notifications at any time through your dairy provider.
privacy.s4Text: Your data is stored securely on Supabase cloud infrastructure. We use encryption in transit (HTTPS) and at rest. Access to your business data is restricted to you and users you authorize (e.g., your drivers).
privacy.s5Text: We do not sell, trade, or share your personal data with third parties. Data is only shared with: Supabase (hosting provider), Meta WhatsApp Business API (for message delivery), and as required by Indian law.
privacy.s6Text: You have the right to: access your data, request correction of inaccurate data, request deletion of your account and data, and opt out of WhatsApp notifications.
privacy.s7Text: For any privacy-related concerns, contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of MilkGo (milkgo.in), operated by DivineXion. By using MilkGo, you agree to these terms.
terms.s1Text: MilkGo is a dairy business management platform that helps tabela owners, mandali owners, milkmen, and drivers manage deliveries, billing, payments, customers, and reports.
terms.s2Text: You must provide a valid Indian mobile number to create an account. You are responsible for keeping your PIN secure. Each account is for one business entity. You must not share your login credentials with unauthorized persons.
terms.s3Text: You agree to use MilkGo only for lawful dairy business management purposes. You must not misuse the platform, attempt to access other users' data, or use the WhatsApp notification feature to send promotional or spam messages.
terms.s4Text: By enabling WhatsApp notifications for your customers, you confirm that you have the right to send them transactional messages. MilkGo sends utility notifications only — delivery updates, bill summaries, and payment confirmations. You are responsible for ensuring your customers' consent.
terms.s5Text: MilkGo offers a free trial period. Paid plans may be introduced in the future. We will notify you before any charges apply. Plan limits (customers, products, etc.) are enforced based on your subscription.
terms.s6Text: You own all business data you enter into MilkGo (customers, deliveries, bills, payments). MilkGo does not claim ownership of your data. You can request export or deletion of your data at any time.
terms.s7Text: MilkGo is provided as-is. While we strive for reliability, we are not liable for any losses arising from service interruptions, data loss, or delivery notification failures. Always maintain your own records.
terms.s8Text: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time by contacting support.
terms.s9Text: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of MilkGo after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.s10Text: For questions about these terms, contact us at:

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help you with any questions about MilkGo.
contact.hoursText: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM — 7:00 PM IST
contact.whatsappText: MilkGo uses the official WhatsApp Business API to send transactional notifications (delivery updates and monthly bills) to your customers. These are utility messages, not promotional.
contact.feedbackText: Have a feature request or feedback? Email us at support@milkgo.in — we read every message.
